title: yapha` #3313
definition:
1) to shine, shine forth or out, cause to shine, send out beams
    1a) (Hiphil)
        1a1) to shine out, shine forth, send out beams
        1a2) to cause to shine
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to shine, shine forth or out, cause to shine, send out beams
    1a) (Hiphil)
        1a1) to shine out, shine forth, send out beams
        1a2) to cause to shine

    NASB:  to shine out or forth, to send out beams, cause to shine
